headline: Is Principal Financial Group (PFG) Fairly Valued Heading Into Earnings?
summary: Upcoming Earnings Set the Stage for Principal Financial Group Principal Financial Group (PFG) heads into its next earnings report with Wall Street expecting quarterly earnings of $2.32 per share and revenue of about $4.11b, both projected higher year over year. Analysts also anticipate positive year over year trends across key revenue sources, including Fees, Net Investment Income, and Premiums, which together help frame expectations around how Principal Financial Group’s diversified business...
